title: Squeeze
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 25 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for ALL your other [gold]Osty[/gold] Attacks.
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 30 damage.
Deals 6 additional damage for ALL your other [gold]Osty[/gold] Attacks.
notes: Total damage is calculated as base damage plus 5 additional damage for each other Osty Attack card in your hand (upgraded: 6 per other attack).
